headline: Bernstein Maintains Outperform on L3Harris Technologies, Lowers Price Target to $405
summary: Bernstein  analyst Douglas Harned   maintains L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $435 to $405.

headline: Palantir Earnings Prediction Market Preview: What Will Alex Karp Say?
summary: Kalshi traders are betting on which words Alex Karp will say on Palantir's Q1 earnings call. Polymarket gives the EPS beat a 96% chance.
